manufacturer_from_details: ‎ The London Oil Refining Company Ltd
description: Product Description Here at Astonish we are proud of our products. Whatever your cleaning problem we aim to have a helpful cleaning solution. Now we’re not saying that we can work miracles, let’s be realistic cleaning can be hard work, but we’ve taken the time to ensure we’ve developed products that get the job done right, nothing less. Fill your home with beautiful fragrance with our Special Aromatic Edition cleaning products. Don’t just clean your home but transform your home into a subtropical paradise, leaving you feeling uplifted and invigorated. Our Antibacterial Cleanser trigger spray makes sure your surfaces are not just clean but hygienically clean, preventing the spread of bacteria. Good enough to eat your dinner off some might say. Great all-purpose product for use all around the home making you cleaning quick, easy, and effective, providing a safe environment for your little ones. Now with the aroma of Pomegranate and Raspberry, you can leave your home feeling fruity and fresh! With no bleach, no taint and no odour the product is suitable for use on food preparation areas plus is also ideal for use in fridges, on high-chairs, bins and toilets. Complies with EN13697:2001 for standard chemical disinfectant Ingredients SPECIAL AROMATIC EDITION Directions Remove any visible soiling. Spray surface and leave it fon for five minutes before wiping with a clean, damp cloth. Do not use on porous surfaces. Allow food preparation areas to dry fully before use. Do not use directly on food or for sterilisation of baby utensils. Causes serious eye irritation. Keep out of reach of children. Read label before use. If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. Wear protective eye protection. Wash hands thoroughly after handling. IF IN EYES: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. If eye irritation persists: Get medical advice/attention. Manufacturer Contact Information Astonish Pomegranate & Raspberry Antibac Surface Cleaner 750ml See more
